category_sources: Official pandoc-crossref documentation describes it as a pandoc filter for figures, equations, tables, and cross-references.
source_facts.description says it is a Pandoc filter for numbering and cross-referencing.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages documentation for lierdakil/pandoc-crossref is the dedicated manual site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/lierdakil/pandoc-crossref; per instructions, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official pandoc-crossref documentation covers numbering and references for figures, equations, tables, sections, and code blocks.
